# Daily operating procedure

## Morning

```text
Review active experiments.
Check guardrail alerts.
Log early metrics.
Select production tasks.
```

## Production block

```text
Create variants.
Run AI critics.
Run human proof/trust review.
Register experiment.
```

## Publishing block

```text
Post platform-native version.
Record timestamp and context.
Queue controlled exposure if needed.
```

## Review block

```text
Update data tables.
Classify failures.
Add comments/viewer language to memory.
Mark kill/replicate/scale candidates.
```

## End-of-day rule

No day ends with:

```text
unlogged post
unexplained failure
unreviewed trust issue
winner without next action
```
